list.title: Care programs
list.enrollError: Could not enroll. Please try again.

list.disclaimer: Care programs support — but don't replace — your doctor. If you feel unwell, book a consultation or seek urgent care immediately.

list.genotypeSkip: I'm not sure — continue without it

detail.title: Care program
detail.riskModerateTip: Stay on top of water, warmth and your medications today.
detail.riskHighTip: Drink water steadily, rest and keep warm. Your care lead can see this too.
detail.riskCriticalTip: Take extra care today. If pain starts, or you have chest pain or trouble breathing, seek care immediately.
detail.crisisLoggedCritical: Crisis logged — your care lead has been alerted. If your pain is severe, or you have chest pain or trouble breathing, seek urgent care now.
detail.crisisLoggedWarning: Crisis logged — your care lead has been notified. Take care of yourself.
detail.labSavedFlagged: Results saved — some values need your doctor's attention, and your care lead has been alerted. Don't change your medication dose yourself.
detail.labSaved: Lab results saved and shared with your care lead.
detail.leaveMessage: You can re-join any time. Your readings stay in your records.
detail.goalStartTracking: Log a reading to start tracking
detail.crisisEmpty: No crises logged. If one happens, log it here — your trigger history helps your care lead personalize your plan.
detail.hydroxyureaDose: Hydroxyurea {{dose}} mg/day — take it exactly as prescribed.
detail.labsEmpty: No lab results yet. After your next blood test (CBC), enter the results here so your care lead can monitor your medication safely.
detail.crisisIntro: Sorry you're going through this. A quick log alerts your care lead and builds your personal trigger picture.
detail.whatTriggered: What do you think triggered it?
detail.wentToHospital: I went to a hospital or clinic
detail.labCopyValues: Copy the values from your blood test (CBC) report — fill in whichever ones you have.
detail.labSafetyNote: Never change your medication dose based on results alone — your care lead reviews every entry.

help.title: Help & support
help.heading: How can we help?
help.subheading: Browse common questions or reach our care support team.
help.faqBookQ: How do I book an appointment?
help.faqBookA: Open a doctor's profile, tap "Book appointment", choose a consultation type, pick a date and time slot, then confirm and pay.
help.faqPrivateA: Yes. All consultations and messages are encrypted and confidential, accessible only to you and your doctor.
help.faqVideoA: At your appointment time, open the appointment and tap "Join video call". Make sure you have a stable internet connection.
help.faqRxQ: How do I get a prescription?
help.faqRxA: After your consultation, your doctor can issue a digital prescription which appears in your appointment details.
help.faqCancelQ: How do I cancel or reschedule?
help.faqCancelA: Open the appointment from the Appointments tab and tap "Cancel appointment". Refunds follow our cancellation policy.
